_description: Quoted strings that are not endpoint references: a bare label ('Reboot'), a traversal-relative image path ('../i/Logout_Normal.png'), and a static asset must not be inferred as action endpoints

content.text: var BTN_REBOOT = "Reboot"; var IMG_LOGOUT = "../i/Logout_Normal.png"; var ICON = "/i/reboot_icon.png";
